commands.review_summary:
The PR changes recent-session discovery to read a bounded first JSONL header line and adds session-manager regression tests for long and oversized headers.

PR surface: Source +26, Tests +67. Total +93 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main has a source-level reproduction path: a valid JSONL session whose header line exceeds 512 bytes can be readable by loadEntriesFromFile but skipped by findMostRecentSession because isValidSessionFile parses only the first 512 bytes.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed because this open implementation PR is focused and has no concrete automated-fix blocker from review.
